titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Class of 1919, Yale College, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday January 11, 2019 at 08:39

did.abstract: The records consist of address lists, correspondence, obituaries, and pictorial records documenting alumni and reunions of the Yale College Class of 1919. Included in the records are biographies of classmates, documentation on the 1952 Yale-Harvard crew race commemorating the 100th anniversary of the the first intercollegiate crew race, and records of Henry I. Baldwin as class secretary.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 10-A (YRG 10-A), Records of Yale College classes.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access is partially restricted. See inventory for details.Original audiovisual materials, as well as preservation and duplicating masters, may not be played. Researchers must consult use copies, or if none exist must pay for a use copy, which is retained by the repository. Researchers wishing to obtain an additional copy for their personal use should consult Copying Services information on the Manuscripts and Archives web site.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Class of 1919, Yale College, Records (RU 345). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of address lists, correspondence, obituaries, and pictorial records documenting alumni and reunions of the Yale College Class of 1919. Included in the records are biographies of classmates, documentation on the 1952 Yale-Harvard crew race commemorating the 100th anniversary of the the first intercollegiate crew race, and records of Henry I. Baldwin as class secretary.

did.unittitle: Individual biographical folders for class of 1919
1919 newspaper clippings and Class Day Exercises booklet
Harvard-Yale crew race on Lake Winnipesaukee, N.H., commemorating the 100th anniversary of first intercollegiate crew race in U.S.
Records of Henry I. Baldwin as Class Secretary, Class of 1919
Yale Alumni Magazine : Correspondence and Class Notes
Motion picture films of Class of 1919 reunions,Yale College
